fests.name: Thomso 2026
fests.description: The annual cultural festival of IIT Roorkee. A three-day extravaganza of music, art, fashion, dance, and literature, featuring top celebrities and students from all over India.

eventsList.name: Battle of Bands
eventsList.rules: Bands must perform at least one original composition.

eventsList.name: Vogue (Fashion Show)
eventsList.rules: Theme-based walk. Maximum 12 members per team.

eventsList.name: Street Play (Nukkad Natak)
eventsList.rules: Time limit is 20 minutes. No electrical instruments allowed.

eventsList.name: Pronite (Celebrity Performance)
eventsList.rules: Entry restricted to students with valid Thomso ID passes.

fests.name: Cognizance 2026
fests.description: The 2nd largest technical festival in Asia. Hosts competitive coding events, paper presentations, guest lectures, robotics battles, and startup expos.

eventsList.name: RoboWars
eventsList.rules: Wired or wireless robots under 30kg category.

eventsList.name: Prototype Exhibition
eventsList.rules: Project model demonstration with working hardware.

fests.name: Sangram 2026
fests.description: The official sports festival of IITR, bringing together teams from premier technical and engineering institutes across India to compete in 15+ sports.

eventsList.name: Inter-Collegiate Cricket Cup
eventsList.rules: T20 format, standard ICC rules apply.

fests.name: NSS Social Summit 2026
fests.description: An annual social summit organized by NSS IITR focusing on solving grassroots problems, featuring case studies, panels, and community development pitches.

eventsList.name: Social Case Study
eventsList.rules: Propose technical solutions to rural sanitation and water harvesting.

eventsList.name: Blood Donation Drive
eventsList.rules: Conducted in collaboration with IITR Hospital staff.

fests.name: Shrishti 2026
fests.description: The annual exhibition of the Hobbies Club. All sections (Software, Electronics, Fine Arts, Photography, Astronomy, Robotics) showcase their year-long projects.

eventsList.name: Electronics & Robotics Demos
eventsList.rules: Autonomous drones and smart home automation displays.

upcomingClubEvents.description: Learn the fundamentals of Next.js App Router and how it connects to decentralized apps. Open to all branches.
A 3-hour competitive coding challenge designed specifically for beginners to test data structures knowledge.
Jeopardy-style security hacking contest covering cryptography, web security, and reverse engineering.
Free intermediate hip-hop and contemporary dance session. No prior experience required.
